assessment_objectives.objective: investigations for a "serious incident" of operational Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) documents a Root Cause Analysis (RCA).
investigations for a "serious incident" of operational Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) documents a risk assessment of the incident.

investigations for a "serious incident" of operational Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) documents a description of corrective actions taken, including measures implemented to prevent a recurrence of the incident.
